1.description: Long-run event time returns This figure shows the average cumulative abnormal Daniel et al. (1997) (DGTW) characteristic-adjusted abnormal returns over the [–5, +250] event window surrounding the announcement of top picks and industry-year/analyst-year-matched buy recommendations. Information on top picks is obtained from Thomson Reuters Investext and Thomson Reuters Eikon. Analyst and brokerage house information is retrieved from I/B/E/S.
